description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a bright neon green exterior, featuring a distressed, weathered texture with black scuff marks and patches. The can displays a large, bold, circular black-and-white label with geometric elements and clear, blocky typography. The top of the can is slightly recessed, with a visible pull tab, and the rim is defined by a subtle metallic edge. The surface appears matte with some roughness, suggesting it has been handled or exposed to the elements. The can's cylindrical shape and proportions are typical for single-serve beverages, and it is likely empty or partially filled. The overall appearance is eye-catching and urban, suitable for street or park environments.
description: A neon green, weathered aluminum beer can with a bold black-and-white circular label and visible scuff marks, featuring a pull tab on top.
description_view_0: The can's front shows the main black-and-white circular label with bold typography, and prominent black scuff marks on the green surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the label more centrally, with the pull tab and rim clearly visible, and additional weathering marks on the side.
description_view_2: The label is partially out of view, showing mostly the distressed green surface with black patches and the can's top.
description_view_3: The can's back is visible, with no label, only the neon green color and heavy black weathering marks.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, circular black-and-white geometric design with large, blocky text. The overall style is modern and eye-catching, set against a neon green, distressed background with visible weathering.
